nasb.text: When you built your shrine at the beginning of every street and made your high place in every square, in disdaining money, you were not like a harlot.

esv.text: building your vaulted chamber at the head of every street, and making your lofty place in every square. Yet you were not like a prostitute, because you scorned payment.

cnv.text: 你在各路口建造你的高岡，又在各廣場上築起你的高壇；然而你並不像一個妓女，因為你藐視賣淫所得的賞賜。

ccb.text: 因为你在街头巷尾筑祭坛，在广场建高高的神庙，甚至不收淫资，实在连妓女都不如。
